description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies in the frontal area 2 times, and inflicts Down for 1.5 sec. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, attack range increases by 50%, and Down duration increases by 0.5 sec.

Dashes behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG to enemies in range 3 times, increasing Physical DMG taken by [30%->24%] for [4 sec->5 sec]. [God's Proxy]: Damage increases by 25%, skill cast time is reduced by 1 sec, and Critical Rate is applied [500->600] higher.

Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [2 sec->1 sec]. Then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, empowering skills. [God's Proxy]: ATK increases, Normal Attack DMG [increases by 150%->increases by 100%]. [(removed) Attack Speed by 30%, Physical Evasion by 300, and Status Resistance by 600.]

ATK increases, and Magic Evasion increases by [250->360]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [30%->20%], and damage taken [is reduced by 30%->from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%]. [(removed) Magic DEF increases.]

dark.unified: On hit, increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec.

light.unified: Physical Evasion increases by 600 for the duration..

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by [100%->34%] for the duration.
On evasion, restores 6% of Max HP every 3 sec.

description.unified: [Judgment Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30%, and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max [10 times->5 times] and is irremovable.

dark.unified: On hit, deals additional Physical DMG equal to [80%->60%] of ATK. Applied at [160%->120%] against non-hero enemies and can only trigger once every 0.5 sec.
